listening.title: Listening: Childhood memories
listening.transcript: I was very shy when I was a child, and I wasn't interested in sports. My best friend and I were in the same class for years. My school wasn't far from home.

questions.question: What was the speaker like as a child?
questions.explanation: "I was very shy when I was a child."

listening.title: Listening: A travel story
listening.transcript: Last summer, I visited Hoi An with my family. We booked a small hotel and stayed for four days. We explored the old streets every evening.
